macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Dow Jones Rises 0.1% to 46,993 Amid Mixed Close
items.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average closed up 0.1% at 46,993.26 on March 18, 2026, reaching an intraday high of nearly 482 points, with 14 of 30 components positive. Trading volume was lower at 16.9 billion shares.

items.title: Nasdaq Gains 0.5% Led by Western Digital's 9.6% Surge
items.summary: The Nasdaq Composite advanced 0.5% to 22,479.53, driven by tech leaders like Western Digital (WDC), which jumped 9.6% and holds a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy). The index hit an intraday high over 195 points up.

items.title: S&P 500 Up 0.3% with All Sectors Positive
items.summary: The S&P 500 rose 0.3% to 6,716.09 on March 18, 2026, with all 11 sectors gaining; Information Technology (XLK) and Consumer Discretionary (XLY) led with 1.5% and 1.2% increases respectively. VIX fell 4.9% to 22.37.

items.title: Stocks Open Lower After Hot February PPI Data
items.summary: U.S. stocks opened lower on March 18, 2026, following accelerated Producer Price Index in February, with Dow (-0.42%), S&P 500 (-0.28%), Nasdaq (-0.23%), and Russell 2000 (-0.84%) declining; VIX rose 3.76% to 23.21.

items.title: Fed Expected to Hold Rates Steady Amid Inflation Concerns
items.summary: The Federal Reserve is set to keep interest rates unchanged on March 18, 2026, providing fresh economic insights after PPI acceleration raised inflation fears, pressuring yields and small caps.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Smart Contract Platform OP_NET Launches Mainnet on March 19
items.summary: OP_NET, a Bitcoin Layer 1 native smart contract platform, officially launches its mainnet today, enabling DeFi, gaming, and social apps on Bitcoin with Ethereum-like programmability. The project previously secured $5 million in funding led by Further.

items.title: Top Crypto Tokens: RIVER Surges 9.11%, MNT Drops 10.07% on March 19
items.summary: In the top 100 cryptocurrencies, RIVER led gainers with a 9.11% rise to $24.91, while MNT fell 10.07% to $0.7631; other notable movers include KAS up 6.25% and UNI down 7.38%. Data reflects market movements as of March 19, 2026.

items.title: Bitcoin Hits $74K, Highest in Six Weeks Ahead of Fed Dot Plot
items.summary: Bitcoin surged past $74,000 early on March 18, 2026, rising over 3.5% in a day to reach $74,425, its highest level in six weeks, as markets await the Fed's dot plot update.

items.title: Binance Lowers VIP Thresholds and Expands Programs Effective March 19
items.summary: Binance reduces BNB holding and futures trading requirements for VIP 1-3 levels, introduces a new VIP Holder Program up to VIP 9, and expands futures referral eligibility starting March 19 at 23:59 UTC.

items.title: South Korean Bitcoin Treasury BitMax Denies Plans to Sell Holdings
items.summary: Amid financial losses and trading suspension rumors, South Korean digital asset treasury BitMax denies reports of selling its Bitcoin holdings to exchanges like Bybit and Binance.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Autoscience Raises $14M to Build World's First Automated AI Research Lab
items.summary: Autoscience announced on March 18, 2026, that it has secured $14M in seed funding to automate the research and development process in AI.

items.title: AI News Briefs: Cerebras Systems Deployed on AWS for Fastest AI Inference
items.summary: AWS is deploying Cerebras CS-3 systems via AWS Bedrock for high-speed AI inference using open-source LLMs and Amazon Nova models, achieving 5x token throughput boost with disaggregated architecture.

items.title: Moonshot AI Introduces Attention Residuals for Improved Transformer Layers
items.summary: Moonshot AI unveiled Attention Residuals (AttnRes), a new method allowing transformer layers to reference earlier layers more effectively, diverging from standard residual connections.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Octavian Gaming Titles Go Live with Novibet in Mexico
items.summary: Octavian Gaming has announced the launch of its high-quality game portfolio with Novibet, expanding its presence in the Mexican gaming market.

items.title: March Madness 2026 Tournament Underway
items.summary: March Madness 2026 is currently happening with the full schedule, tournament format, top seeds, and major storylines now available for fans.
